name: 30" White Covered Storage Closet - Brightroom™
description:
Add extra storage to any space in your home with this Covered Storage Closet from Brightroom™. Designed in solid white for easy integration into any decor scheme, this covered storage closet stands 30 inches tall and holds up to 22 pounds. Great for storing a wide variety of clothing and accessories, the zipper closure helps keep everything covered and secured.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
